---
title: "Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2010). Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?."
date: "2010-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_cycletouring_2010"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/6396"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This article discusses the role of cycle-touring as a sustainable alternative for tourism in the context of declining oil availability and climate change. It explores the potential for low-carbon travel to redefine leisure practices."
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2010

[URL](http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/6396) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This article discusses the role of cycle-touring as a sustainable alternative for tourism in the context of declining oil availability and climate change. It explores the potential for low-carbon travel to redefine leisure practices.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2010). Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{lovelace_cycletouring_2010,
	title = {Cycle-touring: a vision of post-peak holidays?},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/6396},
	abstract = {This article discusses the role of cycle-touring as a sustainable alternative for tourism in the context of declining oil availability and climate change. It explores the potential for low-carbon travel to redefine leisure practices.},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2010},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
